title: jaltomata contorta
intro: Jaltomata contorta, also known as the twisted jaltomata, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It is a shrub-like plant native to Mexico and Central America, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and stems. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, ultimately providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Traditionally, Jaltomata contorta is prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it may also be used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
